summary: Implemented full auth spike for replacing x-api-key with Cognito JWT auth. Deliverables: Cognito provisioning script, scientist CLI (Device Flow), Lambda Authorizer (JWKS-cached JWT validation + legacy x-api-key fallback), Flask before_request middleware (scope enforcement, no-op in offline/test), end-to-end validation script (local + remote modes). Wired into api.py and serverless.yml. Committed to spike/286-modern-auth.
user_notes: spike components ready to test (30m planning/tuning + 5m for deliverables. Impressive.
